category_sources: source_facts.description says utilities create limited user accounts in a chroot jail; official homepage describes tools for deploying chroot jails and limiting accounts to files or commands.
display_name_sources: Savannah project name is Jailkit; official homepage About section uses Jailkit.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Documentation section listing online man pages and HOWTOs; jailkit man page is the general overview.
repo_sources: Official Savannah project lists a CVS Repository and Browse Sources Repository for Jailkit.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe chroot jail automation, limited shells, and security-focused tools.
